verses.1: Answer me when I call, God of my righteousness.
verses.2: You sons of men, how long shall my glory be turned into dishonor?
verses.3: But know that the LORD has set apart for himself him who is godly;
verses.4: Stand in awe, and don’t sin.
verses.6: Many say, “Who will show us any good?”
verses.7: You have put gladness in my heart,
verses.8: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep,
